_comment: SR 11-7 validation requirements matrix. Defines what validation components are required for each combination of validation type and model risk tier. Used by the agent to scope validation activities and by the dashboard to explain why each component was run.

conceptual_soundness.description: Evaluation of model design, theoretical basis, assumptions, and limitations

outcomes_analysis.description: Back-testing model predictions against actual outcomes; computing accuracy, Gini, KS, AUC

population_stability.description: Population Stability Index (PSI) analysis to detect input distribution shift

challenger_comparison.description: Comparison of production model against challenger or benchmark model
challenger_comparison.note: Required for HIGH-tier; recommended for MEDIUM-tier. Absence should be documented.

sensitivity_analysis.description: Stress-testing model behavior at extreme inputs, boundary conditions, and weight concentration checks

ongoing_monitoring.description: Routine monitoring of model performance metrics at defined frequency

hitl_requirements.description: When human Model Risk Officer review is required. All entries in ALWAYS_HITL_CONDITIONS frozenset in state.py.

always_hitl.HIGH_TIER_INITIAL_VALIDATION: All HIGH-tier initial validations require MRO sign-off before model deployment
always_hitl.HIGH_TIER_CHANGE_VALIDATION: All HIGH-tier change validations require MRO sign-off before change deployment
always_hitl.ANNUAL_REVALIDATION_HIGH_TIER: Annual revalidation of HIGH-tier models requires MRO sign-off per SR 11-7
always_hitl.PERFORMANCE_DEGRADATION_TRIGGERED: Triggered review due to metric degradation always requires MRO — may involve suspension
always_hitl.PSI_CRITICAL: PSI > 0.25 indicates significant population shift — independent validation required
always_hitl.MATERIAL_FINDING: Any material model limitation or gap requires MRO documentation and approval
always_hitl.CHALLENGER_UNDERPERFORMS: When production model underperforms challenger — deployment decision requires MRO
always_hitl.HARD_RULE_VIOLATION_DETECTED: Any hard rule circumvention in production is a critical finding — CRO escalation required
always_hitl.FAIR_LENDING_FLAG: Fair lending / disparate impact concern requires Fair Lending Officer + MRO review

threshold_hitl.MEDIUM_TIER_TRIGGERED: Triggered review for MEDIUM-tier models requires MRO review
threshold_hitl.CHANGE_VALIDATION_ANY_TIER: Any model change validation requires documented MRO review of change scope

reviewer_escalation_matrix.MODEL_VALIDATION_TEAM: Low-tier or routine monitoring events — team-level sign-off
reviewer_escalation_matrix.MODEL_RISK_OFFICER: Standard HIGH-tier reviews, MEDIUM-tier triggered reviews, material findings
reviewer_escalation_matrix.CHIEF_RISK_OFFICER: HIGH-tier critical degradation, hard rule violations, CRO-level regulatory exposure
reviewer_escalation_matrix.BOARD_RISK_COMMITTEE: Systemic model failure, regulatory enforcement, model suspension affecting core operations

performance_thresholds.description: Degradation thresholds that trigger automated review escalation. These are Python constants in nodes.py — not configurable at runtime.

accuracy_drop_pct.description: Accuracy decline exceeding 5 percentage points from baseline

gini_drop_points.description: Gini coefficient decline exceeding 10 points from baseline

ks_stat_drop_pct.description: KS statistic decline exceeding 8 percentage points

psi_warning.description: Population Stability Index between 0.10 and 0.25 — moderate shift

psi_critical.description: Population Stability Index above 0.25 — significant population shift

false_positive_rate_increase.description: FPR increase exceeding 5 percentage points — analyst efficiency impact

false_negative_rate_increase.description: FNR increase exceeding 3 percentage points — risk identification gap
false_negative_rate_increase.note: FNR threshold is tighter than FPR — missing true positives in compliance models has greater regulatory risk than false positives

APPROVED.meaning: Model approved for continued use without conditions
APPROVED.next_action: Continue monthly/quarterly monitoring; schedule next revalidation per tier

CONDITIONALLY_APPROVED.meaning: Model approved for continued use with specific remediation conditions
CONDITIONALLY_APPROVED.next_action: Model owner must remediate each condition within specified deadline. MRO tracks remediation.

UNDER_REVIEW.meaning: Validation in progress or escalated — model use may continue with enhanced monitoring
UNDER_REVIEW.next_action: MRO coordinates with CRO or Board for escalated reviews. Enhanced monitoring during review.

SUSPENDED.meaning: Model use suspended pending remediation — manual process must replace model output
SUSPENDED.next_action: Model owner implements manual override or fallback. Suspension remains until MRO approves remediation.

RETIRED.next_action: Successor model must complete INITIAL_VALIDATION before deployment. Retired model archived.
